name: cde-quality
title: Data Quality & Metadata Completeness
description: CDE-authored — metadata completeness by source, profiling status & most-missing attributes over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: CompletenessBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.metadata_completed_field_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.metadata_expected_field_count),0),1) AS pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ProfilingStatus
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.data_profile_status,''),'Not Profiled') AS status, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: MissingAttrs
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Owner' AS attr, SUM(missing_owner_count) AS cnt FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT 'Group', SUM(missing_group_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT 'File Type', SUM(missing_filetype_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT 'Path', SUM(missing_path_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT 'Created Date', SUM(missing_created_date_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT 'Modified Date', SUM(missing_modified_date_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT 'Accessed Date', SUM(missing_accessed_date_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot ORDER BY 2 DESC
